lever: Memoize args-independent dispatch metadata for repeated ValueAndGradWrapped calls, and validate prepared metadata against the live request static inputs before reuse.

benchmark.worker: local fallback (no admissible workers: critical_pressure=2,insufficient_slots=1 or active_project_exclusion=1)
benchmark.baseline_command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-base-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes
benchmark.candidate_command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-candidate-guard-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes
benchmark.same_binary_ab_command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-prepared-ab-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- prepared_dispatch_metadata

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes - execution still uses the request root_jaxpr, transform stack, args, backend, and compile options; only proof/key recomputation is memoized for identical static inputs
isomorphism.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes - no data ordering or selection logic changed
isomorphism.floating_point: identical - transform execution and arithmetic paths are untouched
isomorphism.rng: unchanged - no RNG state or seed handling touched
isomorphism.cache_key_semantics: preserved - prepared metadata carries mode, jaxpr fingerprint, transform stack/evidence, backend, compile options, custom hook, and unknown features; mismatches reject before reuse
isomorphism.strict_mode: fail closed - prepared metadata cannot bypass unknown incompatible feature rejection

focused_tests: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-dispatch-test-target rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch prepared_metadata -- --nocapture
checks: RUSTFLAGS="--cap-lints allow" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-dispatch-clippy-target3 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets -- -D warnings
RUSTFLAGS="--cap-lints allow" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-1yn9y-api-clippy-target3 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-api --all-targets -- -D warnings
known_preexisting_blockers: cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets -- -D warnings without dependency lint caps fails in existing dependency crates: fj-trace unused num_spatial, fj-lax too_many_arguments/doc_lazy_continuation/excessive_precision, fj-interpreters manual_is_multiple_of, fj-ad needless_range_loop/manual_is_multiple_of
